sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_rand64 (id UInt64, random_value UInt64) ENGINE = Memory;
INSERT INTO test_rand64 (id, random_value) VALUES (1, rand64()), (2, rand64()), (3, rand64());
SELECT id, random_value FROM test_rand64 WHERE random_value > 1000000000000000000;
UPDATE test_rand64 SET random_value = rand64() WHERE id = 2;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_rand64 WHERE random_value % 2 = 0;
